steps.title: Isolate $x + 7$
steps.content: Starting from $8(x+7) = 7(x+7) + 68$, subtract $7(x+7)$ from both sides: $$8(x+7) - 7(x+7) = 68$$ $$(x+7) = 68.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches the correct answer, 68, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C is correct.
